signal_watch.title: Vercel Plugin now available in VS Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: The Vercel Plugin is now available in VS Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI. GitHub Copilot now has Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel plugin also helps Copilot stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it for Copilot Chat, search for @agentPlugins vercel in the Extensions panel in VS Code. To install it for the GitHub Copilot CLI, run npx plugins add vercel/vercel-pl
signal_watch.excerpt: The Vercel Plugin is now available in VS Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI. GitHub Copilot now has Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel plugin also helps Copilot stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it for Copilot Chat, search for @agentPlugins vercel in the Extensions panel in VS Code. To install it for the GitHub Copilot CLI, run npx plugins add vercel/vercel-pl

signal_watch.title: AgentMail joins the Vercel Marketplace
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: You can now provision and manage AgentMail directly from the Vercel Marketplace. Your AI agents can send, receive, and respond to email from a real inbox. AgentMail handles the mail servers and deliverability. Key capabilities: Provision inboxes and custom domains through the API Handle threads, attachments, and deliverability out of the box Trigger agentic workflows using webhooks and WebSockets Install AgentMail on the Vercel Marketplace or with the Vercel CLI: vc i agentma
signal_watch.excerpt: You can now provision and manage AgentMail directly from the Vercel Marketplace. Your AI agents can send, receive, and respond to email from a real inbox. AgentMail handles the mail servers and deliverability. Key capabilities: Provision inboxes and custom domains through the API Handle threads, attachments, and deliverability out of the box Trigger agentic workflows using webhooks and WebSockets Install AgentMail on the Vercel Marketplace or with the Vercel CLI: vc i agentma

signal_watch.title: Chat SDK adds X adapter support
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Chat SDK now supports X, extending its single-codebase approach to Slack, Discord, GitHub, Teams, Telegram, and WhatsApp with the new X adapter . Teams can build bots that reply to public mentions and hold direct message conversations through the X API v2 and the X Activity API . The adapter handles CRC verification and webhook signature checks automatically and can manage OAuth token refresh for long-running bots. Likes are the only supported reaction, and responses post onc
signal_watch.excerpt: Chat SDK now supports X, extending its single-codebase approach to Slack, Discord, GitHub, Teams, Telegram, and WhatsApp with the new X adapter . Teams can build bots that reply to public mentions and hold direct message conversations through the X API v2 and the X Activity API . The adapter handles CRC verification and webhook signature checks automatically and can manage OAuth token refresh for long-running bots. Likes are the only supported reaction, and responses post onc

signal_watch.title: Agent Runs now show subagent activity on eve projects
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: You can now inspect subagent activity for eve projects in Agent Runs . The new Subagents tab shows every subagent, organized by which turn started it. Each row shows the prompt, duration, and any failures, all on a shared timeline. Click any subagent to open its run. The tab shows the same details as a parent run: turns, tool calls, metadata, cost, and token usage. Open Agent Runs to try it, or read the documentation to learn more. Read more
signal_watch.excerpt: You can now inspect subagent activity for eve projects in Agent Runs . The new Subagents tab shows every subagent, organized by which turn started it. Each row shows the prompt, duration, and any failures, all on a shared timeline. Click any subagent to open its run. The tab shows the same details as a parent run: turns, tool calls, metadata, cost, and token usage. Open Agent Runs to try it, or read the documentation to learn more. Read more

signal_watch.title: Endform joins the Vercel Marketplace
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Endform is now available on the Vercel Marketplace . It runs your Playwright tests in parallel, so your suite finishes in the time of your slowest test. Key capabilities: Run every test on its own isolated machine, so they don't interfere Bring your existing Playwright tests with no config changes Get a pass/fail check on every production and preview deployment, linked to full traces in the Endform dashboard Spot flaky tests by tracking results across historical runs Pay only
signal_watch.excerpt: Endform is now available on the Vercel Marketplace . It runs your Playwright tests in parallel, so your suite finishes in the time of your slowest test. Key capabilities: Run every test on its own isolated machine, so they don't interfere Bring your existing Playwright tests with no config changes Get a pass/fail check on every production and preview deployment, linked to full traces in the Endform dashboard Spot flaky tests by tracking results across historical runs Pay only

signal_watch.title: Node.js 20 is being deprecated on October 1, 2026
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Following the Node.js 20 end of life on April 30, 2026, we are deprecating Node.js 20 for Builds and Functions on October 1, 2026. How can I see which of my projects are affected? You can see which of your projects are affected by this deprecation with: Will my existing deployments be affected? No, existing deployments with Serverless Functions will not be affected. Invocations to already-deployed functions will continue to work normally. Only new deployments will be affected
signal_watch.excerpt: Following the Node.js 20 end of life on April 30, 2026, we are deprecating Node.js 20 for Builds and Functions on October 1, 2026. How can I see which of my projects are affected? You can see which of your projects are affected by this deprecation with: Will my existing deployments be affected? No, existing deployments with Serverless Functions will not be affected. Invocations to already-deployed functions will continue to work normally. Only new deployments will be affected
signal_watch.reason_selected: 当日新抓取且未展示过：Node.js 20 is being deprecated on October 1, 2026 来自 Vercel AI 的公开抓取入口，证据链保留原始链接与抓取来源。

hot_rank.summary: Endform is now available on the Vercel Marketplace . It runs your Playwright tests in parallel, so your suite finishes in the time of your slowest test. Key capabilities: Run every test on its own isolated machine, so they don't interfere Bring your existing Playwright tests with no config changes Get a pass/fail check on every production and preview deployment, linked to full traces in the Endform dashboard Spot flaky tests by tracking results across historical runs Pay only
hot_rank.excerpt: Endform is now available on the Vercel Marketplace . It runs your Playwright tests in parallel, so your suite finishes in the time of your slowest test. Key capabilities: Run every test on its own isolated machine, so they don't interfere Bring your existing Playwright tests with no config changes Get a pass/fail check on every production and preview deployment, linked to full traces in the Endform dashboard Spot flaky tests by tracking results across historical runs Pay only

hot_rank.title: Node.js 20 is being deprecated on October 1, 2026
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: Following the Node.js 20 end of life on April 30, 2026, we are deprecating Node.js 20 for Builds and Functions on October 1, 2026. How can I see which of my projects are affected? You can see which of your projects are affected by this deprecation with: Will my existing deployments be affected? No, existing deployments with Serverless Functions will not be affected. Invocations to already-deployed functions will continue to work normally. Only new deployments will be affected
hot_rank.excerpt: Following the Node.js 20 end of life on April 30, 2026, we are deprecating Node.js 20 for Builds and Functions on October 1, 2026. How can I see which of my projects are affected? You can see which of your projects are affected by this deprecation with: Will my existing deployments be affected? No, existing deployments with Serverless Functions will not be affected. clusters.title: Vercel Plugin now available in VS Code and GitHub Copilot CLI
clusters.summary: The Vercel Plugin is now available in VS Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI. GitHub Copilot now has Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel plugin also helps Copilot stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it for Copilot Chat, search for @agentPlugins vercel in the Extensions panel in VS Code. To install it for the GitHub Copilot CLI, run npx plugins add vercel/vercel-pl

clusters.title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi

clusters.title: AgentMail joins the Vercel Marketplace
clusters.summary: You can now provision and manage AgentMail directly from the Vercel Marketplace. Your AI agents can send, receive, and respond to email from a real inbox. AgentMail handles the mail servers and deliverability. Key capabilities: Provision inboxes and custom domains through the API Handle threads, attachments, and deliverability out of the box Trigger agentic workflows using webhooks and WebSockets Install AgentMail on the Vercel Marketplace or with the Vercel CLI: vc i agentma

clusters.title: How to Debug Coding Agents with LangSmith Traces
clusters.summary: Use LangSmith to trace coding agents across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, and more. Inspect tool calls, subagents, errors, costs, and retries.

clusters.title: Chat SDK adds X adapter support
clusters.summary: Chat SDK now supports X, extending its single-codebase approach to Slack, Discord, GitHub, Teams, Telegram, and WhatsApp with the new X adapter . Teams can build bots that reply to public mentions and hold direct message conversations through the X API v2 and the X Activity API . The adapter handles CRC verification and webhook signature checks automatically and can manage OAuth token refresh for long-running bots. Likes are the only supported reaction, and responses post onc

clusters.title: Agent Runs now show subagent activity on eve projects
clusters.summary: You can now inspect subagent activity for eve projects in Agent Runs . The new Subagents tab shows every subagent, organized by which turn started it. Each row shows the prompt, duration, and any failures, all on a shared timeline. Click any subagent to open its run. The tab shows the same details as a parent run: turns, tool calls, metadata, cost, and token usage. Open Agent Runs to try it, or read the documentation to learn more. Read more
